auth.subtitle: Your rights. Your money back.
auth.checkEmail: Enter the code from your email

scan.title: Scan receipts
scan.body: Snap a photo of your receipt. Receipto auto-extracts merchant, date, and products.

watch.title: Track warranties
watch.body: We remind you before your statutory warranty and burden-of-proof window expire.

reclaim.title: Get your money back
reclaim.body: When something breaks, we draft a legally sound complaint letter for you.

receipts.emptySubtitle: Tap + to scan your first receipt.

product.beruflichHint: Mark as Werbungskosten for your tax return

rights.nacherfuellungBody: You are primarily entitled to repair or a new, defect-free delivery.
rights.ruecktrittBody: If repair fails twice, you can withdraw from the contract or reduce the price.
rights.schadensersatzBody: If the seller is at fault, you may claim additional compensation.

warranty.beweislastumkehrIn_one: Reverse burden of proof ends in {{count}} day
warranty.beweislastumkehrIn_other: Reverse burden of proof ends in {{count}} days

profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Used automatically in your complaint letters.
profile.addressPlaceholder:
Street and number
Postal code City

dashboard.allGoodSub: No unused subscriptions, no expiring warranties.
dashboard.emptySub: Scan your first receipt or add a subscription.

assistant.comingSoonBody:
Ask questions about your purchases, warranties, and subscriptions — in natural language.

"When did I buy my AirPods?"
"Which subscriptions haven't I used in 3 months?"

subscriptions.emptySubtitle: Tap + to add your first subscription.
subscriptions.quickCancelBody: Receipto will draft a legally sound cancellation letter for {{name}}.
subscriptions.deleteConfirmBody: The subscription will be permanently removed from Receipto. The actual subscription stays active.
subscriptions.zombieBody: This subscription hasn't been used in more than 60 days. Is it still worth it?

new.title: Add subscription
new.hasCancellationButtonHint: Does the website have a direct cancellation option per §312k BGB?

cancellation.title: Cancel subscription
cancellation.whatWillHappenBody: Receipto drafts a legally sound cancellation letter under §312k BGB (extraordinary cancellation if no cancellation button is present). You can review, edit, and send it by email.
cancellation.generatingHint: This usually takes a few seconds.

consent.title: Important notice
consent.body: Receipto generates letters based on your input and current law. Please review the letter before sending. Receipto is not a substitute for a lawyer.

new.title: File complaint
new.defectPlaceholder: Describe the defect as precisely as possible. Example: "The battery drains within a few hours even though it's fully charged."

preview.title: Complaint letter
preview.mailUnavailable: No mail app configured on this device.

notifications.openSettings: Tap here to open system settings.

camera.permissionBody: Receipto needs access to your camera to scan receipts.

paywall.title: Receipto Plus
paywall.subtitle: Unlock unlimited receipts and all features.

settings.title: Settings
settings.deleteConfirmBody: All your receipts, complaints, and profile data will be permanently deleted.
settings.deleteFailed: Delete failed. Please try again later.

legal.placeholderNotice: ⚠️ Placeholder text. Will be reviewed by a lawyer before launch.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.body:
Receipto is the data controller under the GDPR.

We process your personal data only to provide the Receipto service: receipt recognition, warranty deadline tracking, and generation of legally compliant complaint letters.

Server location: Frankfurt am Main (Supabase, eu-central-1).

Contact: privacy@receipto.de

[Full text will be provided by a lawyer before launch.]

imprint.title: Imprint
imprint.body:
Information per § 5 TMG

Receipto
Owner: [Name to be added]
[Street and number]
[Postal code City]
Germany

Contact:

VAT ID: [to be added]

[Full imprint will be provided by a lawyer before launch.]
